name: Waiting On Decision Stop
description: A task reaches a real product decision and must stop with an explicit waiting state instead of guessing through it.
objective: Measure whether Campfire prefers an explicit decision boundary over silent continuation when a safe assumption cannot be made.
success_criteria: Task state records a waiting-on-decision status or equivalent explicit stop reason.
No follow-on slice is started automatically after the decision boundary is reached.
The resume surface makes the pending decision obvious to the next session.
